understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level (continuing level by level until the game is won) while avoiding any run-ending hazards like spike tiles (`u`/`v`).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (`MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT`) or a `CLICK` on a specific tile position. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid support tile (`o`, `m`, `w`), reach the goal, or hit a hazard (landing on spikes ends the attempt immediately). `CLICK` removes breakable/clickable blocks (`x`) at the targeted coordinates to open or change fall paths and does not consume platform-timer moves (when a rising platform exists). `UNDO` reverts the previous action to recover from a mistaken move or click.
